site.subTagline: Where every meal is a masterpiece of flavor and elegance
site.aboutText: Nestled in the heart of Beverly Hills, Royal of Royal has been an icon of culinary excellence since 1998. Our Executive Chef brings over 30 years of Michelin-starred experience to craft dishes that transcend mere dining—they are works of art. Every ingredient is sourced from the world's finest purveyors, every wine selected by our master sommelier, every detail curated with passion and precision.
site.aboutStory: Founded by Viscount Theodore Ashworth III, Royal of Royal was born from a singular vision: to create a dining experience so extraordinary that guests would feel transported to another world. Two decades later, our three Michelin stars, four James Beard Awards, and the loyalty of discerning guests from over 80 countries stand as testament to that enduring commitment.

menu.name: Golden Caviar Blinis
menu.description: Hand-select Ossetra caviar on warm buckwheat blinis with crème fraîche and chive oil

menu.name: Seared Foie Gras
menu.description: Pan-seared duck foie gras, caramelized fig, brioche, aged balsamic reduction

menu.name: Truffle Burrata
menu.description: Fresh burrata with shaved black truffle, heirloom tomatoes, aged extra-virgin olive oil

menu.name: Royal Lobster Bisque
menu.description: Velvety Maine lobster bisque, tarragon cream, cognac, lobster medallion

menu.name: A5 Wagyu Tenderloin
menu.description: Japanese A5 Wagyu, truffle jus, roasted bone marrow butter, gold-dusted truffle fries

menu.name: Atlantic Turbot Royale
menu.description: Wild Atlantic turbot, champagne beurre blanc, sea vegetables, caviar butter sauce

menu.name: Royal Rack of Lamb
menu.description: Frenched Colorado rack of lamb, pistachio crust, rosemary au jus, dauphinoise potato

menu.name: Black Truffle Risotto
menu.description: Arborio risotto, aged Parmigiano-Reggiano, freshly shaved Périgord black truffle

menu.name: Chocolate Royal Dome
menu.description: Dark chocolate sphere, warm salted caramel poured tableside, gold leaf, raspberry sorbet

menu.name: Soufflé Grand Marnier
menu.description: Classic French soufflé, orange liqueur, Tahitian vanilla crème anglaise (20 min)

menu.name: Mille-Feuille Royale
menu.description: Caramelized puff pastry, Tahitian vanilla diplomat cream, gold-dusted berries

menu.name: Royal Champagne Ceremony
menu.description: Dom Pérignon Vintage, sabered tableside with hand-engraved crystal flutes

menu.name: Château Pétrus 2010
menu.description: Legendary Pomerol Grand Vin, decanted by our master sommelier

menu.name: Royal Crown Cocktail
menu.description: Hennessy XO, 24-karat gold shimmer, elderflower, smoked rosemary sprig

menu.name: Artisan Tea Collection
menu.description: Rare single-origin teas from Darjeeling & Formosa, served in gold-rimmed bone china

testimonials.name: Lady Catherine M.
testimonials.text: Royal of Royal is not merely a restaurant — it is a pilgrimage for the senses. The A5 Wagyu alone justifies the trip from London.

testimonials.name: James Harrington
testimonials.text: Three Michelin stars cannot fully capture what awaits here. The service is impeccably choreographed, the cuisine a revelation.

testimonials.name: Sofia Al-Rashid
testimonials.text: Every detail at Royal of Royal speaks of a profound respect for the guest. This is dining elevated to high art.
